questions.question: Which two bodies of water separate Britain from mainland Europe?
questions.answer: The English Channel and the North Sea

questions.question: What radio Indian promised, "As long as you live, as long as I live, I will ride with you"?
Whose 100,000 write-in votes put Nixon in the White House, according to Hubert Humphrey?
What's a charged atom with unequal numbers of electrons and protons?
Who, when asked by House Speaker Sam Rayburn to sing The Yellow Rose of Texas, said: "Take your hand off the suit, creep"?
